title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 17 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 17 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 17 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 17/11/2025
DCE iron ore futures continued to fluctuate rangebound with a stronger bias today,with the I2601 closing at 788.5 yuan, up 1.81% from the previous trading day, and the increase expanded. Traders showed good willingness to sell; steel mills purchased as needed, and some mills with better steel sales had stronger restocking intentions, resulting in a moderate overall market transaction atmosphere. In Shandong, PB fines traded at 785-795 yuan, up 10-15 yuan/mt from last Friday; in Hebei, the mainstream transaction price for PB fines was 795-805 yuan/mt, also up 10-15 yuan/mt from last Friday.
